channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NY Times/Siena Poll Shows Trump Leading GOP, but One-Third Want Change
item.description: A New York Times/Siena poll finds President Donald Trump still dominates the Republican Party, though some GOP voters are signaling a desire for change.

item.title: Biden Student Loan Program Suggests Being Alive Was Optional
WATCH: Dem Senator Clashes with Acting AG Blanche, Accuses Him of Lying
item.description: Acting AG Blanche and Sen. Van Hollen argue over whether a pardoned Jan. 6 rioter promised child abuse victims money from a DOJ restitution fund.

item.title: Rep. Buddy Carter to Newsmax: I'm the Ga. Senate Candidate Without 'Baggage'
item.description: Rep. Buddy Carter, R-Ga., told Newsmax he believes his U.S. Senate candidacy is the strongest among the three Republicans in the Georgia race.
